status_model.prepared: attempt is materialized and ready to launch; controller may emit it in a launch queue
status_model.running: attempt has been launched and is expected to make row progress
status_model.needs_rerun: current attempt should not be relaunched; controller must prepare a new attempt or reuse prefix into a new attempt
status_model.completed: active attempt wrote the full expected row set and passed controller-level completion checks

attempt_modes.fresh_full_batch: default mode: one fresh worker owns the whole batch from the first task with empty CSV bodies
attempt_modes.fresh_restart: rerun mode: discard the previous active attempt for execution purposes and launch a newly prepared empty full-batch attempt
attempt_modes.continue_from_prefix: recovery mode: launch one fresh worker that preserves a validated prefix and owns the remaining suffix until batch completion
attempt_modes.narrowed_suffix_only: last-resort recovery mode: launch only a narrowed unresolved suffix segment after repeated no-progress or row-count failures

failure_types.startup_no_row: both CSVs remain header-only after startup timeout
failure_types.header_only_timeout: CSV outputs stay header-only too long after launch
failure_types.partial_stall: a partial attempt stops increasing row counts for too long
failure_types.row_count_mismatch: collector/lint finds valid prefix but missing or extra rows
failure_types.schema_error: collector/lint finds severe structural/schema problems in an attempt output
failure_types.verifier_forced_rerun: verifier requires rerunning a company or batch
failure_types.agent_unresponsive: launcher or main agent cannot obtain progress/heartbeat from the assigned worker
